svg.text: BENGALI + ODIA — RUNNING TEXT · PASSAGES
ALT DRAFT · SERIES 16D · REMEMBER FORWARD
— BENGALI — PASSAGE 1 · TAGORE —
আমার সোনার বাংলা, আমি তোমায় ভালোবাসি
Āmār sonār Bāṅglā, āmi tomāy bhālobāsi.
"My golden Bengal, I love you." — Rabindranath Tagore. Now the national anthem of Bangladesh.
— BENGALI — PASSAGE 2 · PROVERB —
সার সার কথা, না হয় মিথ্যা সাধনা।
Truth is truth, do not pursue falsehood. — Bengali proverb.
— BENGALI — BRIDGE PHRASE · REMEMBER FORWARD —
এটি আপনার জন্য বিনামূল্যে তৈরি হয়েছিল।
যারা সামনের কথা মনে রেখেছিল, তাদের দ্বারা।
Āpnār janya bināmūlye tairi hayechila. Yārā sāmaner kathā mane rekhechila, tāder dvārā.
"Made for you, freely. By those who remembered what lies ahead."
— LANGUAGE NOTE — "FORWARD" IN BENGALI —
সামনে (sāmane): "ahead / forward" — lit. "in front." Opposite: পেছনে (pechane) = behind.
ভবিষ্যৎ (bhaviṣyat): "future" — Sanskrit root bhū (to be) + future suffix. "That which will be."
ODIA (ଓଡ଼ିଆ) · RUNNING TEXT · PASSAGES
— ODIA — PASSAGE 1 · PROVERB —
ଆଏସ୍ମାରେ ଭୂମି ମା
Āes'māre bhūmi mā.
"This earth is our mother." — Odia proverb. Reverence for land central to Odisha culture.
— ODIA — BRIDGE PHRASE · REMEMBER FORWARD —
ଏହା ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ବିନାମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ତିଆରି ହୋଇଛି।
ଯିଏମାନେ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତ ମନେ ରଖିଥିଲେ, ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଦ୍ଵାରା।
Āpaṇaṅka pāî bināmūlyare tiāri hoichi. Yiemāne bhaviṣyata mane rakhiṭhile, semānaṅka dvārā.
"Made for you, freely. By those who remembered the future."
— LANGUAGE NOTE — "FUTURE" IN ODIA —
ଆଗକୁ (āgaku): "forward / ahead" — lit. "toward the front." ଆଗ (āga) = front/fire. Same root!
ଭବିଷ୍ୟତ (bhaviṣyata): "future" — same Sanskrit root as Bengali bhaviṣyat. Pan-Indic term.
Odia classical literature (Panchasakha movement, 15th–16th c.) predates modern prose tradition.
— DECODING NOTE —
Bengali: ~230M speakers. Largest language in Bangladesh; 2nd largest in India. Official in West Bengal.
Odia: ~40M speakers. Classical language of India. Script distinct from Bengali despite shared ancestry.
Geographic link: Kolkata (Bengali center) to Bhubaneswar (Odia center) ≈ 440km — within 500mi.
PLATE 16D ALT · BENGALI/ODIA · TEXT · CC BY-SA 4.0 · REMEMBERFORWARD.ORG
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
